channel.title: Historical Materialism (Brill)
channel.description: Latest advance articles from Historical Materialism journal

item.title: Revolutionary Strategy Revisited: Strategic Hypotheses and Open Questions
item.author: Panagiotis Sotiris

item.title: Beyond Micro-Politics: Critical Reflections on the Anti-Capitalist Theories of the Commons and Recollection of the Commune as a Movement Yet to Be Realised
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Ali Yalçın Göymen
item.author: Ali Yalçın Göymen

item.title: [OA] From Althusser to Foucault and Back: State, Discipline and Governmentality in the Crisis of Neoliberalism
item.description: Open Access · Author(s): Edemilson Paraná, Lucas Trindade, Alexandre Marinho Pimenta
item.author: Edemilson Paraná, Lucas Trindade, Alexandre Marinho Pimenta

item.title: In the Tracks of Political Marxism: Eurocentrism, Imperialism, and Capitalist Development
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Teddy Paikin, Sam Salour
item.author: Teddy Paikin, Sam Salour

item.title: [OA] Introduction to ‘The Lukács Question’
item.description: Open Access · Author(s): Stuart Elden, Adam David Morton
item.author: Stuart Elden, Adam David Morton

item.title: Value, Exchange, and Heinrich’s ‘New Reading of Marx’: Remarks on Marx’s Value-Theory, 1867–72
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Barbara Lietz, Winfried Schwarz
item.author: Barbara Lietz, Winfried Schwarz

item.title: New Orders: Hegemony as a Method of Political Work
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Peter D. Thomas
item.author: Peter D. Thomas

item.title: Power(s) or Exploitation: On a ‘Point of Heresy’ between Foucault and Marx
item.author: Matteo Polleri

item.title: Exploring the Ambiguities of the Fifth Comintern Congress
item.author: Mike Taber

item.title: Free Development of Each, Free Development of All: Marshall Berman’s Marxism
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Philippe Le Goff
item.author: Philippe Le Goff

item.title: Education for National Liberation: Theories of Freedom and Dependency in the Practical Pedagogy of Marta Harnecker and Gabriela Uribe
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Martín Arboleda, Francisca Benítez
item.author: Martín Arboleda, Francisca Benítez

item.title: How Can Nature Come Apart from Itself? Self-Consciousness and Metabolic Rift
item.author: Mathew Abbott

item.title: Beyond Japanese Marxism and Uno Kōzō: Reflections on The Sublime Perversion of Capital by Gavin Walker
item.description: Restricted Access · Author(s): Ken C. Kawashima
item.author: Ken C. Kawashima

item.title: Labour Relations and Relational Labour: Care, Ontology and Social Reproduction
item.author: Paddy Gordon

item.title: The Long Duration of the Ongoing Wave of Accumulation
item.author: Daniel Albarracín
